SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut.ctg

Class ECIRequest

java.lang.Object
com.nib.supernaut.ctg.ECIRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
ECIReturnCodes
public class ECIRequest extends Object implements ECIReturnCodes
Represents an ECI (External Call Interface) request for communicating with a CICS gateway. This class includes constants for various synchronization modes, extend options, and return codes, as well as fields for request details such as user ID, password, program name, and commarea.

    Fields inherited from interface com.nib.supernaut.ctg.ECIReturnCodes

    astrCics_Rc, astrCics_Rc2, ECI_ERR_ALREADY_ACTIVE, ECI_ERR_CALL_FROM_CALLBACK, ECI_ERR_CICS_DIED, ECI_ERR_CICSRC2_JWT_ALGORITHM_INVALID, ECI_ERR_CICSRC2_JWT_TOKEN_EXPIRED, ECI_ERR_CICSRC2_JWT_TOKEN_INVALID, ECI_ERR_EXEC_NOT_RESIDENT, ECI_ERR_INVALID_CALL_TYPE, ECI_ERR_INVALID_DATA_AREA, ECI_ERR_INVALID_DATA_LENGTH, ECI_ERR_INVALID_EXTEND_MODE, ECI_ERR_INVALID_VERSION, ECI_ERR_LUW_TOKEN, ECI_ERR_MAX_SESSIONS, ECI_ERR_MAX_SYSTEMS, ECI_ERR_MORE_SYSTEMS, ECI_ERR_MSG_QUAL_IN_USE, ECI_ERR_NO_CICS, ECI_ERR_NO_MSG_QUALS, ECI_ERR_NO_REPLY, ECI_ERR_NO_SESSIONS, ECI_ERR_NO_SYSTEMS, ECI_ERR_NULL_MESSAGE_ID, ECI_ERR_NULL_SEM_HANDLE, ECI_ERR_NULL_WIN_HANDLE, ECI_ERR_REQUEST_TIMEOUT, ECI_ERR_RESOURCE_SHORTAGE, ECI_ERR_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT, ECI_ERR_ROLLEDBACK, ECI_ERR_SECURITY_ERROR, ECI_ERR_SYSTEM_ERROR, ECI_ERR_THREAD_CREATE_ERROR, ECI_ERR_TRANSACTION_ABEND, ECI_ERR_UNKNOWN_SERVER, ECI_ERR_XID_INVALID, ECI_NO_ERROR, strINVALID_CICS_RC

    • syncMode

      protected final int syncMode

    • Userid

      public String Userid
      The user ID for the ECI request.

    • Password

      public String Password
      The password for the user ID.

    • Transid

      public String Transid
      The CICS transaction ID.

    • Program

      public String Program
      The CICS program name to be executed.

    • Commarea

      public byte[] Commarea
      The communication area (Commarea) as a byte array.

    • Commarea_Length

      public int Commarea_Length
      The length of the communication area (Commarea).

    • JWTToken

      public String JWTToken
      The JWT (JSON Web Token) for authentication, if used.

    • Extend_Mode

      public int Extend_Mode
      The extend mode of the request. Possible values are ECI_NO_EXTEND or ECI_EXTENDED.

    • Luw_Token

      public int Luw_Token
      The LUW (Logical Unit of Work) token for the request. The default value is ECI_LUW_NEW.

    • Abend_Code

      public String Abend_Code
      The abend (abnormal end) code received from CICS, if any.

    • Cics_Rc

      public int Cics_Rc
      The CICS return code.

  • Constructor Details

    • ECIRequest

      public ECIRequest(String userid, String password, String progName, byte[] commArea, int extendMode, int luwToken)
      Constructs a new ECIRequest instance with the specified parameters. The synchronization mode is set to ECI_SYNC.
      Parameters:
      userid - The user ID for the request.
      password - The password for the user ID.
      progName - The CICS program name.
      commArea - The communication area as a byte array.
      extendMode - The extend mode.
      luwToken - The LUW token.

    • ECIRequest

      public ECIRequest(int syncMode, String userid, String password, String progName, String transid, byte[] commArea, int extendMode, int luwToken)
      Constructs a new ECIRequest instance with the specified parameters.
      Parameters:
      syncMode - The synchronization mode (e.g., ECI_SYNC, ECI_ASYNC).
      userid - The user ID for the request.
      password - The password for the user ID.
      progName - The CICS program name.
      transid - The CICS transaction ID.
      commArea - The communication area as a byte array.
      extendMode - The extend mode.
      luwToken - The LUW token.

    • ECIRequest

      public ECIRequest(int syncMode, String userid, String password, String progName, String transid, byte[] commArea, int calen, int extendMode, int luwToken)
      Constructs a new ECIRequest instance with the specified parameters, including the communication area length.
      Parameters:
      syncMode - The synchronization mode.
      userid - The user ID.
      password - The password.
      progName - The program name.
      transid - The transaction ID.
      commArea - The communication area.
      calen - The length of the communication area.
      extendMode - The extend mode.
      luwToken - The LUW token.

    • ECIRequest

      public ECIRequest(int syncMode, String userid, String password, String progName, String transid, Channel channel, int extendMode, int luwToken)
      Constructs a new ECIRequest instance with the specified parameters, using a Channel object.
      Parameters:
      syncMode - The synchronization mode.
      userid - The user ID.
      password - The password.
      progName - The program name.
      transid - The transaction ID.
      channel - The Channel object.
      extendMode - The extend mode.
      luwToken - The LUW token.

  • Method Details

    • hasChannel

      public boolean hasChannel()
      Checks if the request has an associated channel.
      Returns:
      true if a channel is present, false otherwise.

    • reset

      protected void reset()

    • getCicsRc

      public int getCicsRc()
      Returns the CICS return code (Cics_Rc).
      Returns:
      The CICS return code.

    • getCicsRcString

      public String getCicsRcString()
      Returns the string representation of the CICS return code.
      Returns:
      A string describing the CICS return code.

    • getRc

      public int getRc()
      Returns the general return code of the request. If a gateway return code is present, that is returned; otherwise, the CICS return code is returned.
      Returns:
      The return code.

    • getGatewayRc

      public int getGatewayRc()
      Returns the specific gateway return code. If no gateway return code is present, it returns 0.
      Returns:
      The gateway return code.

    • getGatewayRcString

      public String getGatewayRcString()
      Returns the string representation of the gateway return code.
      Returns:
      A string describing the gateway return code, or strINVALID_GATEWAY_RC if invalid.

    • getRcString

      public String getRcString()
      Returns the string representation of the general return code. If a gateway return code is present, its string is returned; otherwise, the CICS return code string is returned.
      Returns:
      A string describing the return code.

    • setErrors

      protected void setErrors(Integer rc, int cicsRc)
